cases.title: TS-35: Live dashboard present count updates within 5 seconds after successful check-in
preconditions: Active session with 10 enrolled students; 3 already Present, 7 Pending
Authenticated Instructor assigned to session with attendance:read (session scope)
Should-capability FR-15 enabled in test environment
Student A enrolled with valid QR token and coordinates within session radius
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance using Instructor session and record summary.present baseline (3)
POST /api/v1/check-in with Student A session, valid tokenId, and in-radius coordinates
Assert check-in HTTP 200 with outcome Success and attendance status Present
Poll GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance every 1 second until summary.present increments to 4 or 5-second timeout elapses
Assert summary.present === 4 and summary.pending decremented by 1
Record elapsed time from check-in success to first poll response reflecting updated count
Assert elapsed time ≤ 5 seconds per FR-15 and NFR-08
cases.expected: FR-15 and testing-plan TS-35 satisfied: Present vs enrolled counts update within 5 seconds of successful check-in without manual reload

cases.title: AttendanceService.getSessionRoster returns updated present and pending counts after check-in transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with Active session and Pending attendance rows for all enrolled students
AttendanceService wired per attendance module with session and enrollment read models
CheckInTransaction completes atomically per domain model §5.2
Baseline summary: present=2, pending=8, absent=0 for 10 enrolled students
steps: Invoke AttendanceService.getSessionRoster(sessionId, instructorId) and capture summary.present and summary.pending
Execute successful check-in transaction for one Pending student (Present outcome, token consumed)
Invoke getSessionRoster(sessionId, instructorId) again after commit
Assert summary.present increased by 1 and summary.pending decreased by 1
Assert records array includes updated student row with status Present and checkedInAt populated
Query attendance_records directly and assert row status matches service summary counts
cases.expected: Module-integration boundary: live monitor poll source returns updated Present vs enrolled metrics immediately after check-in per API design §7.1

cases.title: GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance returns 200 JSON envelope with summary and roster records
preconditions: Active session with mixed attendance statuses (Present, Pending, Absent, Excused)
Authenticated assigned Instructor session with attendance:read for session scope
steps: Send GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains sessionId, summary object with enrolled, present, pending, absent, excused, rejected fields, and records array per API design §7.1
Assert each record includes student.institutionalId, student.displayName, status, and checkedInAt when Present
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 success contract for GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance per API design §7.1; live metrics and roster grid DTO returned for instructor monitor

cases.title: Student denied GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student A session (no attendance:read session roster per roles-permissions §2.2)
Active session with attendance records for Student A and peer students
Known sessionId for that Active session
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance using Student A session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden
Assert response message Bạn không có quyền thực hiện thao tác này per roles-permissions §2.5
Assert response body contains no summary counts, records array, or peer student data
cases.expected: Students lack attendance:read (session roster); live dashboard endpoint denied with no peer data exposed per RBAC matrix

cases.title: Unassigned instructor denied GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Instructor B authenticated but not assigned to session class-subject and not session creator
Active session with attendance data exists in unassigned scope
Instructor B lacks attendance:read for requested session per BR-08
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance using Instructor B session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert errorCode Forbidden or ReportAccessDenied
Assert response contains no summary.present, summary.enrolled, or records roster data
Verify assigned session creator Instructor A can GET same endpoint with HTTP 200
cases.expected: Cross-instructor session monitor access denied per class-subject assignment scope; no live attendance data leaked

cases.title: Instructor Theo dõi tab StatCards refresh within 5 seconds after student check-in
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on desktop viewport at /sessions/:sessionId (Theo dõi tab)
Active session with SessionMonitorDashboard polling every 5 seconds per 12-ui-states §7.3
Should-capability FR-15 enabled; StatCard row shows Đã điểm danh 3, Chưa điểm danh 7, Vắng 0 of 10 enrolled
Student A can complete check-in in parallel browser context or via API trigger
steps: Navigate to /sessions/:sessionId and select Theo dõi tab
Verify StatCard row displays Đã điểm danh 3, Chưa điểm danh 7, and Vắng 0 matching initial API poll per 07-event-specific-components §3.9
Trigger successful check-in for Student A (mobile context or API)
Wait up to 5 seconds without manual page reload for StatCard Đã điểm danh to update to 4
Verify roster grid row for Student A shows Present StatusBadge and check-in timestamp
Assert poll status bar indicates last refresh within 5 seconds per NFR-08
cases.expected: FR-15 browser journey: instructor monitor dashboard StatCards refresh within 5 seconds without manual reload per user-flows §5.2 and page-list §4.3.2

cases.title: Instructor sorts monitor roster by Trạng thái with accurate status order
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on /sessions/:sessionId Theo dõi tab
Active session roster with mixed Present, Pending, Absent, and Excused students
SessionMonitorDashboard DataTable supports column sort per listing-pages §5.3
steps: Navigate to Theo dõi tab and wait for initial roster poll to complete
Click Trạng thái column header to sort by status ascending
Verify aria-sort=ascending on active column header per accessibility §7
Verify row order follows Chờ → Vắng → Có mặt → Có phép instructor priority per listing-pages §5.3
Trigger check-in changing one student from Pending to Present
After next poll cycle, verify sort order still reflects updated statuses accurately per FR-15 sortable roster requirement
cases.expected: FR-15 sortable roster satisfied: sort order reflects current attendance states accurately on monitor roster grid

cases.title: Flow A step 5: Instructor GET /sessions/:id/attendance shows Present count incremented after student check-in
preconditions: Flow A completed through step 4: roster seeded, session created with GPS, opened Active, valid QR token obtained
Student logged in with valid coordinates within radius
Instructor authenticated with session cookie
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance before check-in and record summary.present baseline
POST /api/v1/check-in with Student session, tokenId, and valid coordinates
Assert check-in HTTP 200 outcome Success
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert summary.present === baseline + 1
Assert records array contains student row with status Present and checkedInAt timestamp
Confirm Flow A step 5 per testing-plan §6 tags FR-15 live monitor
cases.expected: Flow A lifecycle includes instructor live attendance dashboard reflecting successful check-in per testing-plan §6 step 5

cases.title: Pending to Present check-in updates summary counts atomically in session roster query
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session; one student attendance_record in Pending state
AttendanceService.getSessionRoster and check-in pipeline share transactional consistency
Summary before transition: present=N, pending=M
steps: Query getSessionRoster and assert target student status Pending in records array
Execute check-in state transition Pending → Present for target student
Invoke getSessionRoster immediately after commit
Assert summary.present === N + 1 and summary.pending === M - 1
Assert target record beforeState Pending and afterState Present with checkedInAt set
Verify enrolled total unchanged
cases.expected: State transition from Pending to Present reflected in live summary counts per FR-15 live metrics requirement

cases.title: Session monitor summary enrolled count matches enrollment table for Active session
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and 142 enrolled students per pilot cohort size
Pending rows seeded for all enrollments on session open per FR-05
AttendanceService.getSessionRoster callable with instructorId
steps: Count enrollments for session classId + subjectId directly in database
Invoke getSessionRoster(sessionId, instructorId)
Assert summary.enrolled equals enrollment count
Assert summary.present + summary.pending + summary.absent + summary.excused + summary.rejected === summary.enrolled
Perform 5 successful check-ins and re-query; assert summary arithmetic invariant holds
cases.expected: Live dashboard Present vs total enrolled counts remain consistent with enrollment and attendance_records aggregate per database design §8.1

cases.title: GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance with invalid sort field returns 400 ValidationFailed
preconditions: Authenticated assigned Instructor session
Active session with attendance data
API accepts sort values displayName, checkedInAt, status only per §7.1
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance?sort=invalidField using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 400 Bad Request
Assert response errorCode ValidationFailed
Assert field-level detail references sort parameter
Assert response contains no summary or records data in error envelope
cases.expected: Invalid sort boundary rejected with ValidationFailed; no attendance roster leaked on malformed query

cases.title: Monitor tab status filter shows only matching roster rows from polled data
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on /sessions/:sessionId Theo dõi tab
Active session with mixed Present, Pending, and Absent students
Client-side status filter per listing-pages §4.4
steps: Navigate to Theo dõi tab and wait for roster poll
Select Trạng thái filter Có mặt (Present) in status Select control
Verify roster grid shows only students with Present StatusBadge
Verify StatCard summary row still reflects full session counts (not filtered totals)
Reset filter to Tất cả and verify all enrolled students visible again
cases.expected: Client-side status filter on monitor tab scopes visible roster rows without altering live summary StatCards per listing-pages §4.4

cases.title: GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance?status=Present filters roster to Present records only
preconditions: Active session with at least 3 Present and 5 Pending students
Authenticated assigned Instructor session
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance?status=Present using Instructor session
Assert HTTP 200 OK
Assert every record in records array has status Present
Assert records.length === summary.present from unfiltered GET
Assert summary object still reflects full session totals (enrolled, pending, absent) per API design §7.1
cases.expected: Status filter query parameter returns filtered roster subset while summary reflects full session counts for live monitor

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: Active session with attendance data exists
No valid session cookie or bearer token
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance without authentication headers
Assert HTTP status 401 Unauthorized
Assert errorCode Unauthenticated
Assert message Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục per BR-06
Assert response contains no summary counts or student roster data
cases.expected: Live dashboard endpoint requires authentication; unauthenticated callers denied with no data leak per BR-06

cases.title: Parallel check-ins from distinct students update live summary counts correctly
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and 20 Pending students
5 distinct students with valid QR tokens and in-radius coordinates
AttendanceService.getSessionRoster callable after concurrent check-in submissions
steps: Record baseline summary.present and summary.pending via getSessionRoster
Submit 5 parallel successful check-in transactions for distinct Pending students
Assert all 5 check-ins return HTTP 200 outcome Success
Invoke getSessionRoster after all commits complete
Assert summary.present === baseline.present + 5 and summary.pending === baseline.pending - 5
Assert enrolled total unchanged and no duplicate Present rows for same student
cases.expected: Concurrent check-ins during Active session each increment live Present count atomically without lost updates per FR-15 real-time metrics

cases.title: Sequential check-ins update dashboard counts within 5 seconds each under normal load
preconditions: Active session with 20 Pending students
Authenticated Instructor polling GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance
Should-capability FR-15 enabled; TestClock or wall-clock timing capture available
steps: Record T0 and perform 3 sequential successful check-ins for distinct students at ~2-second intervals
After each check-in, poll attendance endpoint until summary.present reflects increment or 5-second timeout
Assert each of 3 check-ins produces dashboard count update within 5 seconds per NFR-08
Assert final summary.present === initial + 3 and summary.pending === initial - 3
Assert no manual page reload required between updates
cases.expected: NFR-08 sustained: multiple check-ins during Active session each propagate to live Present vs enrolled counts within 5 seconds without reload

cases.title: GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance?sort=status returns roster ordered by attendance status
preconditions: Active session with at least one student in each status: Pending, Present, Absent, Excused
Authenticated assigned Instructor session with attendance:read for session scope
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance?sort=status using Instructor session
Assert HTTP 200 and records array ordered per server-side status sort (Pending before Absent before Present before Excused per listing-pages §5.3)
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance?sort=displayName and assert alphabetical order by displayName
Change one student from Pending to Present via successful check-in
Re-fetch with sort=status and assert updated student appears in Present group
Verify sort order matches current attendance states per FR-15 sortable roster
cases.expected: Server-side sort parameter on live monitor endpoint reflects accurate current attendance states; status sort order matches instructor priority per API design §7.1 and FR-15
